name: civicassist-ai
description: CivicAssist AI - Intelligent Navigator for Indian Government Schemes

scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run preview --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
